prompts.name: tuscany_rolling_hill_early_morning_g
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional nature photography, Tuscan hillside café at dawn's first light, golden hour sun illuminating xicaras and pães on a café table beneath a sunlit window, with storm clouds gathering over bule-roofed villas in the distance. The scene is textured with toalha xadrez and the aroma of fresh baked bolos wafting through the air, as dewdrops glisten on biscoitos and colheres pequenas. Canon EOS R5, 16-35mm f/2.8, f/11, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: icelandic_lava_field_early_morning_g
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional nature photography, cafe da manha scene set in a quaint Portuguese town, early morning light filtering through a sunlit window, casting warm shadows on a checkered tablecloth adorned with xicaras, pães, mesa de café, bule, bolos, and biscoitos. A bird in flight frames the scene from the open window, capturing the essence of morning tranquility. Sony A7R V, 24mm f/1.4, f/2, ISO 3200, ultra realistic, National Geographic

prompts.name: japanese_bamboo_grov_stormy_overcast
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional nature photography, morning mist illuminates a Portuguese riverside café nestled amidst vibrant green vineyards. The scene unfolds as if captured on a roll of FujiPro 400H film, with warm hues that speak of dawn breaking over the horizon. A rustic wooden table, adorned with a checkered cloth and a gleaming sunlit window, serves as the focal point.

Lined with xicaras filled to the brim with freshly brewed coffee, pães de açucar, bule, bolos, and biscoitos, the table invites a sense of tranquility and serenity. A lone linen napkin, the only pop of contrast against the earthy tones, lies draped elegantly over the edge of the table.

Intricately patterned woven baskets (bule) serve as the base for the morning's offerings, while sugar bowls and small spoons await those who come to partake in this picturesque setting. A hint of freshly cracked farinha on the wooden table adds a layer of texture and authenticity to the scene.

This idyllic café scape finds its soul in the enchanting atmosphere that only the 'cafe_da_manha' category can offer, all set against the backdrop of an early morning sun-drenched window. Canon EOS R5, f/8, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

biomas: Checkerboard towel on an outdoor table
Small kitchen preparing traditional Brazilian breakfast
Street cafe in lively city center
elementos: Steaming cup of cafe da manha
Loaf of pao de queijo on a white dish
Crumbs and sugar on the cafe table
Small forks and sugar packets on a saucer
Bolos and biscoitos displayed on a wood tray
